headline: 把 GitHub 上分散的 AI 开源信号整理成一份适合每天快速浏览的精选清单。
summary: 系统会优先选择最近仍在活跃推进、定位清晰、不是资源集合类噪音仓库的 AI 开源项目，并提供中文摘要、标签和推荐理由。

projects.name: loop-engineering
projects.description: Practical patterns, starters & CLI tools for loop engineering with AI coding agents. Design systems that prompt and orchestrate agents (inspired by Addy Osmani and Boris Cherny). Includes loop-audit, loop-init, loop-cost.
projects.summaryZh: Practical patterns, starters & CLI tools for loop engineering with AI coding agents. Design systems that prompt and orchestrate agents (inspired by Addy Osmani and Boris Cherny). Includes loop-audit, loop-init, loop-cost. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。

projects.name: codeburn
projects.description: Free, local tool to track AI coding token usage and cost across 31 tools and agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Gemini and more), by model, project, and task. npx codeburn
projects.summaryZh: Free, local tool to track AI coding token usage and cost across 31 tools and agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Gemini and more), by model, project, and task. npx codeburn 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。

projects.name: sglang
projects.description: SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models.
projects.summaryZh: SGLang is a high-performance serving framework for large language models and multimodal models. 这是偏视觉和多模态方向的项目，适合关注图像理解与感知交互。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。

projects.name: ms-swift
projects.description: Use PEFT or Full-parameter to CPT/SFT/DPO/GRPO 600+ LLMs (Qwen3.6, DeepSeek-V4, GLM-5.1, InternLM3, Llama4, ...) and 300+ MLLMs (Qwen3-VL, Qwen3-Omni, InternVL3.5, Ovis2.5, GLM4.5v, Gemma4, Llava, Phi4, ...) (AAAI 2025).
projects.summaryZh: Use PEFT or Full-parameter to CPT/SFT/DPO/GRPO 600+ LLMs (Qwen3.6, DeepSeek-V4, GLM-5.1, InternLM3, Llama4, ...) and 300+ MLLMs (Qwen3-VL, Qwen3-Omni, InternVL3.5, Ovis2.5, GLM4.5v, Gemma4, Llava, Phi4, ...) (AAAI 2025). 它更偏数据接入和知识增强，适合做企业检索、问答和私有数据助手。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做知识库问答、企业搜索和私有数据助手的产品团队。

projects.name: inference
projects.description: Swap GPT for any LLM by changing a single line of code. Xinference lets you run open-source, speech, and multimodal models on cloud, on-prem, or your laptop — all through one unified, production-ready inference API.
projects.summaryZh: Swap GPT for any LLM by changing a single line of code. Xinference lets you run open-source, speech, and multimodal models on cloud, on-prem, or your laptop — all through one unified, production-ready inference API. 它主要面向代码场景，适合做 AI 编程助手、代码生成或自动修复。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做 AI Coding、代码审核、开发提效产品的团队。

projects.name: vllm
projects.description: A high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs
projects.summaryZh: A high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs 它更偏底层推理和服务基础设施，适合关注性能、成本和部署效率。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。

projects.name: vllm-omni
projects.description: A framework for efficient model inference with omni-modality models
projects.summaryZh: A framework for efficient model inference with omni-modality models 这是偏视觉和多模态方向的项目，适合关注图像理解与感知交互。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做多模态体验、视觉应用和创作工具的团队。

projects.name: Mooncake
projects.description: Mooncake is the serving platform for Kimi, a leading LLM service provided by Moonshot AI.
projects.summaryZh: Mooncake is the serving platform for Kimi, a leading LLM service provided by Moonshot AI. 它更偏底层推理和服务基础设施，适合关注性能、成本和部署效率。
projects.whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
projects.fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。
